title: 8 Things a Humble Man Actually Does
caption:
Humility gets a bad reputation because most men think it means small.

It doesn't. It means clear.

The humble man knows who he is, who he serves, and what he owes the people around him. He apologizes first — not because he's weak, but because he's not waiting for the other person to go first. He takes correction without burning the man who gave it. He serves without a press release.

And he gets on his knees every day, because the man who prays knows that he is not running this — God is.

"Pride comes before a fall." — Proverbs 16:18.

Humility isn't being quiet. It's being honest about who's in charge.

Save this and send it to a brother walking with God.
